textPlain:
>  each parameter exists in two forms simultaneously
during training: a full-precision 32-bit floating-point value (p) used for gradient updates, and its binarized counterpart
(pb) used for forward computationsSo this is only for inference. Also activations aren't quantized, I think?
Yeah, but it’s ’quantization aware’ during training too, which presumably is what allows the quantization at inference to work
